name: Raspberry and Walnut Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together honey mustard, raspberry vinegar, and sea salt to taste.
2. Gradually add the walnut oil and olive oil in a slow stream, continuing to whisk until the mixture is emulsified.
3. Stir in the minced fresh tarragon.
4. Makes 1/2 cup. (Fresh fields)
